parsed.summary: The repository context indicates a substantial feature addition focused on review architecture, repo checks, and structural validators. The change includes significant new modules (repo-checks.mjs, review-structural.mjs) accompanied by dedicated test files and documentation, suggesting good coverage for the new functionality. Without the actual diff content, specific code-level defects cannot be identified. The structural integrity of the change—matching tests for new scripts and updated schemas—supports shipping this change for further integration testing.
next_steps: Perform a full code review of the actual diff patch when available to verify implementation details and error handling.
Execute the test suite to confirm all new and existing tests pass successfully.
